name: smart_brief
description: An ADK 2.0 graph Workflow that turns a topic into an executive brief: parallel research (angles + facts), fan-in, draft, and an LLM quality-gate loop.

skills.name: Write an executive brief
skills.description: Given a topic, research it in parallel, draft a ~150-word brief, and self-review until it passes a quality gate.
examples: 居家太陽能的經濟效益
